title: Recover from the current failed command without chasing stale lint evidence

items.text: Command log: cargo make smoke-real-world-job failed because apps/elf-eval/fixtures/real_world_memory/work_resume/ did not contain the required suite fixtures. Earlier lint warnings had already been repaired. The exact recovery action is to create the missing fixtures, then rerun cargo make smoke-real-world-job.
Old command log: cargo make lint failed and the next action is to repair clippy warnings before touching fixtures.

answer.content: The current stop is the missing work_resume fixture suite, not the old lint warning. Create the missing fixtures under apps/elf-eval/fixtures/real_world_memory/work_resume/, then rerun `cargo make smoke-real-world-job`.

claims.text: The current command failed because the required work_resume suite fixtures were missing.
Create the missing fixtures, then rerun `cargo make smoke-real-world-job`.
The older lint warning is stale.

timeline.summary: An older lint failure was recorded before fixture work began.
The current suite command failed because the requested fixture directory lacked the required jobs.

prompt.content: The lane failed a command. Tell me what failed now and the exact recovery command path without chasing stale errors.

must_include.text: The current command failed because the required work_resume suite fixtures were missing.
Create the missing fixtures, then rerun `cargo make smoke-real-world-job`.
The older lint warning is stale.

must_not_include: Repair clippy warnings before touching fixtures.

required_evidence.quote: failed because apps/elf-eval/fixtures/real_world_memory/work_resume/ did not contain the required suite fixtures
The exact recovery action is to create the missing fixtures, then rerun cargo make smoke-real-world-job.

answer_correctness.criteria: Identifies the current failed command and recovery action.

trap_avoidance.criteria: Does not use stale lint failure evidence.

workflow_helpfulness.criteria: Gives the recovery path that advances the benchmark suite.

criteria.description: Fixture-backed command recovery should be immediate.

hard_fail_rules: unsupported high-confidence claim about a required decision or fact
use of a negative trap marked failure_if_used = true

acceptable_phrases: The fixture does not provide that evidence.
